speaker: speaker1
text: how long will it take us to drive to London ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I think it ’ s a distance of 180 kilometers from here to London , so it should be a two-hour drive on the motorway .

speaker: speaker1
text: that ’ s unless there is a traffic jam . It could take three hours .

speaker: speaker2
text: you ’ re right . We will be able to travel at high speeds at the beginning and end of the journey , because we will be in built-up areas .

speaker: speaker1
text: so , shall we allow three hours to cover the distance ?

speaker: speaker2
text: ok . You haven ’ t seen my company car , have you ?

speaker: speaker1
text: no . let me take a look ... it ’ s longer than my car .

speaker: speaker2
text: I think it ’ s over five meters long . I can ’ t remember exactly . It has a maximum speed of over 200 kilometers an hour .

speaker: speaker1
text: wow ! That ’ s fast ! I don ’ t think we will be traveling that fast on the motorway .

speaker: speaker2
text: we can ’ t . if we went that fast , we would break the speed limit .
